description: When multiple patterns emerge, synthesis should produce distinct insights with different categories.

insights.title: Seasonal volunteer recruitment window
insights.summary: Three separate captures over the past month mention spring volunteer drives at partner organizations, suggesting a predictable recruitment window the coop could leverage.
insights.whyItMatters: Coordinating recruitment with partner timelines increases the pool of skilled volunteers available for field work.
insights.suggestedNextStep: Post a volunteer call aligned with partner org timelines and cross-promote through shared channels.

insights.title: Documentation format gap
insights.summary: Recent field reports consistently lack GPS coordinates, making them harder to archive with spatial context.
insights.whyItMatters: Adding location data now prevents costly re-visits later and makes archives more useful for future grant applications.
insights.suggestedNextStep: Add a GPS coordinate field to the field report template before the next site visit.
